lessons.title: The Psychology of Influence 🧠
lessons.description: Understand the core principles that make humans vulnerable to manipulation.

lessons.title: Pretexting & Information Gathering 📞
lessons.description: Build believable personas and gather intel to impersonate trusted insiders.

lessons.title: Phishing: The Digital Bait 🎣
lessons.description: Craft convincing emails, clone websites, and bypass email security controls.

lessons.title: Vishing & Smishing 📱
lessons.description: Exploit trust over the phone and via SMS to extract credentials and MFA codes.

lessons.title: Physical Social Engineering & Defenses 🚪
lessons.description: Tailgating, USB drops, and how to build a human firewall.
